name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Mother’s Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17438743/194432416/1521310305?refcode=em050920-header&refcode2=cc21582b-be92-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzIxNTgyYi1iZTkyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zoHNxT-KZvUv2nxrYCkdnScy1gotHOypusEDQIHzCZs=) **** | | Friend,

Last Mother’s Day I shared how for 10 years my mother struggled with infertility, as I have, and how fortunate we both were to have control over our reproductive health — a freedom to which every person is entitled.

The subject of motherhood was brought up in last Sunday’s Georgia Public Broadcasting and Atlanta Press Club debate, with a claim directed at me that without firsthand experience raising children, I lacked the capacity for compassion and nurturing that is needed in government.

When Trip and I came to realize that we were not going to have children, I made the decision to enter public service. If I could not raise children of my own, I was going to dedicate myself to making sure that everyone else’s children had the institutional support needed to grow up in hopeful, nourishing environments.

How we raise our children as a society, and how we choose to invest in the future through government policy, both have to do with the kind of legacy we want to leave for the next generation. Right now it is obvious that we have to do better.

I submit to you my record. Public service and governing well is how I have endeavored to leave a legacy, much in the way those who are fortunate enough to conceive do with raising their kids. I have led a city, saved a public pension, and reformed a public healthcare system. I know in my bones that I can defeat David Perdue, who has allowed Donald Trump to wreak havoc on our country and make us less safe.

I believe in each and every one of you. Together we are going to do what it takes to win this election and deliver our children the kind of country they will be proud to inherit.

To all of the mothers out there, I wish you a sincerely happy Mother’s Day. To those missing their moms, particularly the mothers we have lost in this ongoing pandemic, I hope you can find peace in cherished memories. Let us move all forward together and each leave a legacy to be proud of.

Yours truly,
Teresa
---

* * *

PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17438744/194432417/1521310305?refcode=em050920-footer&refcode2=cc21582b-be92-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzIxNTgyYi1iZTkyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zoHNxT-KZvUv2nxrYCkdnScy1gotHOypusEDQIHzCZs=)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: A Mother’s Day wish for you
body:
| |
---

_**“From my mother I learned the value of prayer, how to have dreams and believe I could make them come true.”**_
— Ronald Reagan
|
---
To all of the patriot mothers and grandmothers, who have fought and are still fighting for a free America for their children, all of us at Tea Party Patriots Action would like to wish you a very Happy Mother’s Day.

And, to those patriots who are missing mothers who have passed, or who find Mother’s Day difficult for other reasons, we send you our prayers and our love.

Families are so, so important. In fact, they are the building block of a free society, and we hope that you and your family have a blessed and joyful day today.

Happy Mother’s Day,

Jenny Beth & the TPPA support team
|
---
|
---

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Happy Mother's Day!
body:
A Mother's Day message from Gina Raimondo
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Happy Mother's Day.
I know this isn't the Mother's Day any of us wanted to have. It's enormously difficult to be physically separated from our loved ones, especially our moms, at such an uncertain time. The stay at home order is lifted, but now is not the time to get together in big groups - particularly if your mom is older. It's just not safe.
That doesn't mean we can't celebrate--it just means we have to be creative. Dr. Nicole Alexander-Scott and I want to wish you and all the mothers in your life a happy Mother's Day.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KITAIuzp6zezaZsTwMzMdCrLBPmLtF1caYQb-Y4Q4dYhKxdYUwYclZFng5maz34cUy3V4vGMG_LgSerjTAv4qQcIJx8dzmT46ltyZRODdfIrQlYf5JzOy-CLHaI3ZSD0BU9yn6yPXWHZFqD_mp3vbD4lPicJ_QnB7k6mQd_vYWYXDx9BJ-LwYDZQeZKoRP-mTLJbp1pjr7b-St0EMHo02_uDnjMt2j8-&c=ekcdATBPzihoxCYcHr3DEqG-XUwBAk3BN615mWhDvIy6C__BnuFk5Q==&ch=_VkdrzKF7QhM_GF4HM-BvxXa_JGrJYFuAEhwROm6sI7tDo_534ScJw==)
---
| On this unusual Mother's Day, I want to recognize all of the hardworking moms who are on our front lines fighting this crisis: doctors, nurses, hospital staff, nursing home staff, home care workers, pharmacists, first responders, law enforcement, National Guard members, teachers, principals, superintendents, grocery store workers, manufacturers, and so many more. You're all heroes to us.
We are grateful for each and every one of you for everything you're doing to get us through this crisis.
Happy Mother's Day.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

name: Jean Bunkeddeko
subject: My Mother’s Day note to Adem
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/bUsThhWJKqsmwOXMCUC5ICsAwpaCqszOX8bYM3gvIDE=/DRZUjiFNNJr9FA8vS6TliDYEI9Cls4tyd48v959y3Vs=)

Peter,

As a mother, nothing gives me greater joy than to watch my children pursue their dreams. For Adem, that dream has always been to make a positive impact on the world by fighting to end inequality and injustice. And as I've watched him follow his passion, from creating job training programs to helping revitalize underserved communities throughout Brooklyn, I feel the type of pride that only a mother can know.

I know that my son will go to Washington with both the values that I have instilled in him and the values community members like you instilled in him: that we always count our blessings and seek to help others, that we never shy away from hard work, and that advocating for folks often means having the courage to speak truth to power. When Adem is elected to Congress, I know that he'll never waver in those values and make you just as proud as he has made me.

For Mother's Day this year, I want to see my son achieve the American Dream that my husband and I dreamt of ourselves when we came to the United States -- the promise that anyone, even a son of Ugandan refugees, could be anything. **[So if you support Adem too, will you make a contribution to his campaign today and help send my son to Washington?](https://act.myngp.com/el/bUsThhWJKqsmwOXMCUC5ICsAwpaCqszOX8bYM3gvIDE=/TJkrqblcL4KCInUuoc-S8nHkeeXnSvKPkxkSRts5mEI=)**

Best,
Jean Bunkeddeko

******[VISIT OUR WEBSITE](https://act.myngp.com/el/bUsThhWJKqsmwOXMCUC5ICsAwpaCqszOX8bYM3gvIDE=/wZICKF6sdm1ST09oWb5GakCKkpu5_gFfPM7d-d1GPZY=)******

name: Josh Hicks
subject: Happy Mother’s Day: Thank you to the strong, independent, caring women in our lives
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Friends --

This Mother’s Day, we celebrate the powerful, strong, and independent women in our lives who helped raise us and helped raise our children.

Today, I’m writing to tell you about two important moms in my life: my mother and my wife.

I know I can say that I’ve had the blessing of a kind and caring, intelligent and compassionate mother in Sharon Hicks.

She was always there for me, whether I needed motivation and support or a good kick in the ass.

I’ll never be able to repay the debt that I owe her. And this Mother’s Day is just an opportunity to say thank you again.

My wife, Bethany, is not only a successful businesswoman, but also a wonderful mother who keeps our family going in good times and bad.

She’s been my staunchest supporter for 20 years now, and I wouldn’t be where I am if it weren’t for her being there for me, no matter the situation.

So, this Mother’s Day, let’s thank the mothers in our lives who do so much for us.
— Josh

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-may?refcode=HIC_20200510_em_org_mothersday_all_ptftr
Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.
He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Worse than I thought
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Schumer and his cronies only need to flip FOUR seats out of 23. Make a 5OO% matched donation and defend the Republican Senate!
Friend, the situation we are facing is worse than I thought. Republicans are defending 23 seats, and Democrats only need FOUR seats to capture the Senate.
**
This is just a snapshot of what Republicans are facing: **
* **Arizona:** The far-left Democrat raised $11 million in the first 3 months of 2020 and **$19.7 million in the bank.**
* **North Carolina,** **Schumer 's Super PAC poured $25 million to defeat** President Trump and his Senate ally.
* **Colorado:** A must-win for Republicans, went from "toss-up" to **" tilts Democrat."**
* **Iowa:** The top Democrat Super PAC announced they are **spending an ADDITIONAL $13.1 million on ads** - that's on top of the $3 million they've already spent!

**We could lose the Senate if you don 't act right now. **[**Rush an immediate 5X MATCHED donation before midnight tonight!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Eft8cf2B25eMdtQnYT6safqQT5EVe5Re3gW51YFwk7HKsHIa6EMlczOykhyOSB4aJOy7_c0HjLYkWAmTM3P11fw72pqY6R5Ld8x14DhjU4YmceCW8XUgzflvEsq4Rfw25uNI-J3cKySUQJJDJ-dWOvb_mAL2ql8ob3Cxzwz6bN9igm14zaeUWnmVAGEzuaiCBr5Ytyeb3_gBEfJwrb0-oAqM2ZY1sJmveoEAnpHIebctamPJmjMmRrCwuIH19BUkzZhqIZ0O57Wa6Set-3yo0DrtS0ax6WqiU7zUXtoY_LlMi3G3CEv9qhXZN5zbtCYXNohTb2NhJ4XVYpTeEDoLFi3qcGYKhTLaGkjoAPA_lMEjh07e8lF5eSezVDcf0YAH9_NEfFk4JPqadizqWt_umRAydzackaDuXD3qVEbCBkNu_UiBrWkcgQ==&c=X1ilFtIDyiVWCJenkYVDru02akappYGYZVy5qGogPbuDmzJ6Fc1xrg==&ch=qSPeBvjiBgD2CAPnvfzrKDc3IqYnLoF4HjElJuRwhkEgz7XXjhvkuA==)

Schumer and far-left Democrats are mounting a hostile takeover of the Senate. Across the nation, liberal billionaires and special interests are doing everything they can to defeat my father and his allies.

Since my father was elected, the Republican Senate worked with him to deliver on key campaign goals and ensure the forgotten men and women of our nation finally had a voice.
**
NOW, all that progress could be destroyed by Schumer and his cronies.** They only need to flip FOUR seats out of 23. name: Martin (Team Young)
subject: Risking failure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
What we do now will go a long way to determining whether we win or lose in November.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xDtxBe95lrLrPttAP6-8Tc_PFRluECMjqc9I63kPdpdlug4IQ_6aHxMCDzA6TjUg2NLNkAG5II5gH466PWMu3jz8MIO7osJwSFAXxrpUnUHn98hSXClA-ZBHZ9ug6xd_DT8_l2byWm-CHLZ96o1wW7nHasLbNmPs-AdXbI7oRABjK6YZq4t8zYQuFVIof9--UveJB6L34PaDwIHlvd5DjDlzpq113UcrvY9bu60B0An_rwTdzxeeowx5OGLTFwtQKbaUo0BSaXe6L-jo-O9vIlf2XAqaW1TJIW73NJBcwj7okenj3qiJ7e_D6GCeOaSQ1hLCNCLPtpvGs9CrjaTq08eq4OdgZ1h-V66zkBEozp0On1uCNhbSzgzqIRmvsB-t&c=h8ha1iBqBfTLEhkKqiELELFh6UMhl1ue_Li5Fe9Z2ABjBtYjU1gaCQ==&ch=ocuyOEKZWW_GVvONT_Ui421Io6DbfRcuWt5Ew_rEv6yc8pEI1RUBSA==)

---
Friend,

We will not win this fight alone, but this is a fight we must win. In a moment, I'm going to ask for your support but I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why it's so important first:

**Young Kim is an immigrant and proud conservative woman** running for Congress to fight for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. She has been a leader in solving the issues of homelessness and affordability -- _the issues we face every day._

**POLITICO has ranked this race as a toss-up** and pundits agree this is one of the seats most likely to FLIP RED. _Winning the primary only proved this._

**We 've always run a grassroots operation, but right now we're relying on our team like never before.** Our campaign has shifted entirely online and these emails are our main means of communication. _That 's why we can't thank you enough for continuing to open (and read!) them._

**This seat will determine who controls the House Majority,** but we can't win this fight alone. We have months of an uphill battle ahead of us and the future of our country is on the line. We can't risk failure.

So, what do you say [**Friend, do we have your support?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xDtxBe95lrLrPttAP6-8Tc_PFRluECMjqc9I63kPdpdlug4IQ_6aHxMCDzA6TjUg2NLNkAG5II5gH466PWMu3jz8MIO7osJwSFAXxrpUnUHn98hSXClA-ZBHZ9ug6xd_DT8_l2byWm-CHLZ96o1wW7nHasLbNmPs-AdXbI7oRABjK6YZq4t8zYQuFVIof9--UveJB6L34PaDwIHlvd5DjDlzpq113UcrvY9bu60B0An_rwTdzxeeowx5OGLTFwtQKbaUo0BSaXe6L-jo-O9vIlf2XAqaW1TJIW73NJBcwj7okenj3qiJ7e_D6GCeOaSQ1hLCNCLPtpvGs9CrjaTq08eq4OdgZ1h-V66zkBEozp0On1uCNhbSzgzqIRmvsB-t&c=h8ha1iBqBfTLEhkKqiELELFh6UMhl1ue_Li5Fe9Z2ABjBtYjU1gaCQ==&ch=ocuyOEKZWW_GVvONT_Ui421Io6DbfRcuWt5Ew_rEv6yc8pEI1RUBSA==)

Martin
Team Young [DONATE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xDtxBe95lrLrPttAP6-8Tc_PFRluECMjqc9I63kPdpdlug4IQ_6aHxMCDzA6TjUg2NLNkAG5II5gH466PWMu3jz8MIO7osJwSFAXxrpUnUHn98hSXClA-ZBHZ9ug6xd_DT8_l2byWm-CHLZ96o1wW7nHasLbNmPs-AdXbI7oRABjK6YZq4t8zYQuFVIof9--UveJB6L34PaDwIHlvd5DjDlzpq113UcrvY9bu60B0An_rwTdzxeeowx5OGLTFwtQKbaUo0BSaXe6L-jo-O9vIlf2XAqaW1TJIW73NJBcwj7okenj3qiJ7e_D6GCeOaSQ1hLCNCLPtpvGs9CrjaTq08eq4OdgZ1h-V66zkBEozp0On1uCNhbSzgzqIRmvsB-t&c=h8ha1iBqBfTLEhkKqiELELFh6UMhl1ue_Li5Fe9Z2ABjBtYjU1gaCQ==&ch=ocuyOEKZWW_GVvONT_Ui421Io6DbfRcuWt5Ew_rEv6yc8pEI1RUBSA==)
* * *
_
During this time of uncertainty, many American families are struggling to make ends meet. Please contribute only if you are able. If you are unable to donate at this time, we could still use your support --__[**endorse Young Kim here!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xDtxBe95lrLrPttAP6-8Tc_PFRluECMjqc9I63kPdpdlug4IQ_6aHzdFHMSrhZju2QjQeyV1A8BELTpe9Gw7vN4vQBONRGBwTIppzYZIIiS1JmDjTTPZruebM14tTFuazk8F1bZOZvMwqJJ9jdPFaZUC1_BIsNAM7RY5vg5Bb4Z7yPxK0V3JQlof6PW6xPa0T9PZot-3cEyE1_Z49FDWHZtMaA4b3_TdixXnqzAqdT9fr889lMfWNqzNTxnAwBtuc-XndgtzkKIGaARd7RQzwJVmunbgD76_8-JKhUxpkIoCJPpx1odN2lKgfyGzvlxbZ8hICu9rmi1DV1ZqH8MEIiKa5V9CJ7Wi0zbR8vL2f_jl-2a9mdPvlA==&c=h8ha1iBqBfTLEhkKqiELELFh6UMhl1ue_Li5Fe9Z2ABjBtYjU1gaCQ==&ch=ocuyOEKZWW_GVvONT_Ui421Io6DbfRcuWt5Ew_rEv6yc8pEI1RUBSA==)_

name: GOP Election Updates
subject: We'll be blunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Aderholt For Congress
body:
Democrats are gaining ground not only in the South, but around the county. Theya€TMre breaking fundraising records month after month -- if we cana€TMt mobilize a surge of grassroots support, I dona€TMt like our chances in the most important election in our lifetimes. If youa€TMre hoping to hand Pelosi and Biden a devastating defeat, we cana€TMt afford to lose any more ground to their Liberal donors.
Friend, we'll be blunt:
Democrats are gaining ground not only in the South, but around the county. They're breaking fundraising records month after month -- if we can't mobilize a surge of grassroots support, I don't like our chances in the most important election in our lifetimes.
If you're hoping to hand Pelosi and Biden a devastating defeat, we can't afford to lose any more ground to their Liberal donors.
[**Do you have the courage to go toe-to-toe with Pelosi's fundraising machine?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q3TiZd3PNTMLZ11o7ufvQLv-z2jsbzUeCbjcsPzHEXXUsRJFuL0BGZ6PK_Sw6biERHr1nQxv1S8DcDHiyVpcB8SUvi9Vyytixz8gWg_SewiQNiDzPxzm3MB29-IWkVnOkKS2Oo4cw1J1uFIM-To7hHu_0G5iK85Gb-vNvn_42mvzpYibLeAY18yAnr9qBEvQpV8dV4EVHRTSwaiEilDr160Dsvdl25bp5d0uqsOPhMtHpxMo7WDxQUQGcVLwYpe-FHltyS1psYxihft1Q-sRg4m4zoZgxqDWwlJ8C4snWMo7lI2sF9o9m9PeZyNBbNf5iC6d5yhqV_zE3PpoG4e8M4P_vrJ8vqvf5Hzc9jnSRCTRAIdlebyA_kPHLxs9GoOYa529CYuxHXoM-bpSTzraHUo18FH7O12r&c=bfNX774SQdbuDtXwVX_d1b7iSab4wJ0F_AN5JyvXKea3TvqY6DJhhQ==&ch=-wbQgM6no4IaTk2TxCJtE4hvswdIo6SSBaX3r5At6663NeoS9AbPlA==)

name: Team Steel
subject: The odds aren’t looking good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Thankfully, we aren't afraid of a tough fight.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M7cMkXqrmIPJMDD0_IVrPLhStDMa_jfuU9QBuNkB0D9yYjCs1-b6OrYbriV0byqUBwR2sAzanBgOiz_isF8Mp7W1ZRXr9RUe6JFvgYMsql88h_PNJ7IWMzUWIV5LsuNcZwedUUwZRNIKfvmbJYrC1P60o6Ev_qt3abnHJAr2_b0Fu98WW2p0rlsAdMn5aTDdMhDKeGPa6UimMH1yJ1fdWboamWh9fTO02o5uDZbS1ynAaPU-_rNXy-HCihq5hOh8bYSwkNn5xsxrkSEG_3kBW2uS_dKPJa_udip4urruVxpnzyAl4WPfiJT2Y4eiY8ldHk1gfo7nKeadROiKZpVZGfzmfMzwO5g3q0oX9tpLiWrAVDpvV1Rw7whTj_oDHVff&c=aPQjcl_iLgyvljjuJjiaolZ4W6QDlqhvDauvzaYQlD5duxnV_1ARuQ==&ch=vGhRnx31Ux3I7fcLCwjE8zn4PAowAqlBurrzhFoyelvURLTW4Qdj_g==)
**Bad news first, Friend:** Our opponent outraised us by nearly double last quarter. Michael Bloomberg spent $4.4+ million to buy this seat in 2018. Dark money groups have $10.4 million in the bank, ready to flood this district with cash at a moment's notice.

**The good news:** This race is being billed as the "Marquee Fight" to watch in November and POLITICO is calling it a toss-up -- which means we can win. We just have to keep fighting.

[**Can we count on you to chip in $23 (our average online donation) right now to keep us in the running?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M7cMkXqrmIPJMDD0_IVrPLhStDMa_jfuU9QBuNkB0D9yYjCs1-b6Ogk2vb-UQNBB2hqtDnkGZKNofoZnggMGHveW7lgwwNLSeDenO0bODHV4PIYd2__7md96gHWospzQlr44kfqsJieAkMYq4VI609gVD2gzv1kj42LOayQ7vCfL4dwgLSgzg5Jlaamb96g02PzQxkEUI5X8VZIQ-cb1vO5CGPknJd5nc2HRM-1t1E8USqjctBqVBfwodnOf0YFDEG83uLqpoSPmHLhaQ9jypGcOedCMarZkcXHk7glvUC_Xd5AziXrAG4Ga_Ot8DH_DxWj1lXd_aVFaUkHlz-rElqgircQH6UVYyADvZ4UPow4WmYB0RZ4sNC3h_15FjPDb&c=aPQjcl_iLgyvljjuJjiaolZ4W6QDlqhvDauvzaYQlD5duxnV_1ARuQ==&ch=vGhRnx31Ux3I7fcLCwjE8zn4PAowAqlBurrzhFoyelvURLTW4Qdj_g==)

Thankfully, Michelle is no stranger to a tough fight. As a first generation American, Michelle watched her single-mother and small business owner suffer at the hands of a broken political system that was taking advantage of those it was built to serve. Since then, she has dedicated her life to providing Californians with quick, common-sense reforms.

Michelle has pledged to vote against any new taxes and fight to lower taxes. Even better, she has the experience to actually do it -- Michelle led the fight to return over $400 million dollars to California taxpayers.

_That 's why, despite having all the odds stacked against us, this race will be decided by just a handful of votes._ In order to win we have to run full speed ahead into November -- that means doing all we can now to ensure we have the resources we need to take on our Bloomberg, dark-money backed opponent in one of the top-targeted races in the nation.

name: Amy Rowell (Margaret's Mom)
subject: what I want to tell you about my daughter:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
Margaret is one of those people who stands up to fight for positive change and she daily demonstrates the values she was raised to care about: Community, Compassion, and Fortitude.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17442706/194519453/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2Y2NWFiMS1lMDkyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJo0Nx_AtYUDbLORmABOjfV5WrXjE_UlgA79vcaXptY=&emci=52044f30-2e92-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=f7f65ab1-e092-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Hi there,

You probably haven’t heard from me yet—I'm Margaret's mother, and even though Mother's Day is usually about families celebrating moms, I wanted to take just a moment to tell you about my daughter.

When Margaret first told me she was thinking of running for office, I was surprised, but then I thought, “of course that’s what she will do next.” In 2016, we were angry that a person who has so little respect for women was going to represent us and we were fearful of what the next four years had in store. Over the last three and a half years, many of us have watched this presidency unravel, many of us have complained, and some of us have stood up and fought everyday to right the wrongs of the election. Margaret is one of those people who stands up to fight for positive change, and she daily demonstrates the values she was raised to care about:

_Community, Compassion, and Fortitude._

I know firsthand how hard Margaret is working to win this race, and I am doing everything I can to help her. And that’s why I am writing to you today—it would make my Mother’s Day if I am able to help her keep on fighting for our values. And, I know (whether we like it or not), fundraising is a big part of winning this race.

Every day Margaret and her team work to create change for us, so today, I decided to work to create change for her—I know how much it means to her and I know how much she depends on you, her community of supporters, to make this change.

**[So, I wanted to ask you, if you’re financially able, would you help by contributing $25 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17442707/194519454/788213855?refcode=em05102020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2Y2NWFiMS1lMDkyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJo0Nx_AtYUDbLORmABOjfV5WrXjE_UlgA79vcaXptY=)**

Thank you for believing in Margaret and the work she does, and thank you for being by her side in this fight for progress,

Amy Rowell
(Margaret’s Mom)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17442708/194519455/788213855?refcode=em05102020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2Y2NWFiMS1lMDkyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJo0Nx_AtYUDbLORmABOjfV5WrXjE_UlgA79vcaXptY=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17442709/194519456/788213855?refcode=em05102020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2Y2NWFiMS1lMDkyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJo0Nx_AtYUDbLORmABOjfV5WrXjE_UlgA79vcaXptY=)

clean_body: Democrats are heading into November with a massive fundraising advantage, and we're on the verge of not being able to catch up. To be blunt, our campaign is at a standstill. If we don't close the gap now, we will lose President Trump's Senate Majority. \---From the Desk of Mitch McConnell--- I wish I was reaching out with different kind of news today, Friend, but I needed to give you this urgent Senate update in the fight for the Majority, and, unfortunately, there's no way to sugarcoat it. Democrats are heading into November with a massive fundraising advantage, and we 're on the verge of not being able to catch up. To be blunt, our campaign is at a standstill, Friend. A few grassroots supporters, like you, can have a HUGE influence on the outcome of this election. == Friend, We know that you are getting a lot of emails as the election season heats up, but we hope you'll take a few minutes to read this important election update. As of this month, our liberal opponent has outraised us by $10 MILLION in what is expected to be the most crucial Senate race in the country. Thanks to the Democrat Machine, Schumer and his handpicked candidate can blanket the airwaves with lies to steal the election from us. If we want to stay competitive in November, we NEED the resources to fight back! == == == == == == The last thing we need now is a return to the failed leftist policies of the past - but that's exactly what we'll get with career politicians Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi. Martha's opponent will be just another rubber stamp of approval for the Democrat's radical agenda. == This will be the most consequential election of our lifetime. Democrats are offering some of the most radical policies we've ever seen, and the stakes have never been higher. It 's now or never. We are at a critical point with just months to go until Election Day. == Thank you for your support, Team McSally == Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc. 5080 NORTH 40TH ST, SUITE 265 PHOENIX, AZ 85032 | | McSally for Senate, Inc. | 5080 NORTH 40TH ST, SUITE 265, Phoenix, AZ 85032 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

name: Team Young
subject: Point of no return
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
In a matter of months, this seat will determine who controls the House Majority and what we do right now, will go a long way to determining the outcome.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AC41Mv3gJCDF6OZfEAINspFp4DXHrmhKI8d3T2p6oR8S9XLw4Fb6uRPxlAwEdtrzy7EKyc3vhMm0b4Zr0iWSDR60A6b4IYk5GJkavZtaY8jQCZ45VIqxoT4bAHaxQdHgyGOZgqqtEaUQgN1cV8Ab14gE7SyKxJS5qgF6oWd9pEfGEQwoK7NH6ghRR0W-2udZgEFMeknNlRwdXzTAJun1ZKmn831NqXjoDqhhmlVm-pzcuIN-2QUPH7r1-A6mOYkIMW0pjBkltrR-fk06_Y7tHMbaL2BHjq_jI1-Uwj5NaXMWfsATacSVr8dLf8BsGZlaeQvNsVCq31Od4z8EaQ1TRlhXb4pB-Lr615E9LnFwbrj1CZIDgFPS1EmrSeY6I9se&c=dWwbfh-MPf5BIR8eF_7bnn6Va0mkE74Q_SJbhSCrXGfNmWE5LUHl5Q==&ch=Kj_3VBwfDkMSPsA5YDrh9B0b-DzOzs5FfQuE6gdbNROs09cXkYslsg==)
---

We are approaching the point of no return, Friend. In a matter of months, this seat will determine who controls the House Majority and what we do right now will go a long way to determining the outcome.

[**We need 100 grassroots conservatives to chip in $10 by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to keep us in the fight. Can we count on you to be one of them?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AC41Mv3gJCDF6OZfEAINspFp4DXHrmhKI8d3T2p6oR8S9XLw4Fb6uRPxlAwEdtrzsscAMmx33XyOmzTsO7dFLF2PFWH43W83WkIVkqyzE_fUxcDiJknaCAC64_M_zh-R3DuHHTKJiDNSrvLXHnMRx2tYK0asix-mmnvJaDnZZduQVUTuM6UNlq3YpuFw763o-n1VDluDfXlEVaaYLV02z3D5mWmsY-6---0jS9SW68X0rNW0BbCoqzJNOhBjMLDlVoS73b0nsegHqx7Zw0FN70h1tbecvj3raFW6Qf9CHqyR93BGanamjhY_eVgU0BaUTZrz2xjwavvLPtqRO1420SOB89FJegDW7gUKUItsrug0Am2DIK7oF_6OiiE6YOg4&c=dWwbfh-MPf5BIR8eF_7bnn6Va0mkE74Q_SJbhSCrXGfNmWE5LUHl5Q==&ch=Kj_3VBwfDkMSPsA5YDrh9B0b-DzOzs5FfQuE6gdbNROs09cXkYslsg==)

Falling behind simply isn't an option. Our liberal opponent is a self-funded millionaire backed by Nancy Pelosi's deep pockets. If we're short now, we'll never be able to catch up.

But right now, we have the momentum it's going to take to win. Against all odds, we WON our primary. _Even beating the Democrat incumbent_. We're aiming for a repeat performance in November, but to succeed we have to keep moving forward.

[**Will you chip in $10 right now to keep our momentum going and help restore conservative leadership to this seat, this state, and our great nation?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AC41Mv3gJCDF6OZfEAINspFp4DXHrmhKI8d3T2p6oR8S9XLw4Fb6uRPxlAwEdtrzsscAMmx33XyOmzTsO7dFLF2PFWH43W83WkIVkqyzE_fUxcDiJknaCAC64_M_zh-R3DuHHTKJiDNSrvLXHnMRx2tYK0asix-mmnvJaDnZZduQVUTuM6UNlq3YpuFw763o-n1VDluDfXlEVaaYLV02z3D5mWmsY-6---0jS9SW68X0rNW0BbCoqzJNOhBjMLDlVoS73b0nsegHqx7Zw0FN70h1tbecvj3raFW6Qf9CHqyR93BGanamjhY_eVgU0BaUTZrz2xjwavvLPtqRO1420SOB89FJegDW7gUKUItsrug0Am2DIK7oF_6OiiE6YOg4&c=dWwbfh-MPf5BIR8eF_7bnn6Va0mkE74Q_SJbhSCrXGfNmWE5LUHl5Q==&ch=Kj_3VBwfDkMSPsA5YDrh9B0b-DzOzs5FfQuE6gdbNROs09cXkYslsg==)

Young Kim has a target on her back. Washington Democrats have seen the strength of our grassroots team and are coming at us with everything they've got. They spent millions against us in 2018 to keep an immigrant, female, and conservative voice out of office -- now, they're gearing up to do it again.

**Nancy Pelosi is trying to buy this seat outright. We need your help to stop her in her tracks.** [DONATE $10](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AC41Mv3gJCDF6OZfEAINspFp4DXHrmhKI8d3T2p6oR8S9XLw4Fb6uRPxlAwEdtrzsscAMmx33XyOmzTsO7dFLF2PFWH43W83WkIVkqyzE_fUxcDiJknaCAC64_M_zh-R3DuHHTKJiDNSrvLXHnMRx2tYK0asix-mmnvJaDnZZduQVUTuM6UNlq3YpuFw763o-n1VDluDfXlEVaaYLV02z3D5mWmsY-6---0jS9SW68X0rNW0BbCoqzJNOhBjMLDlVoS73b0nsegHqx7Zw0FN70h1tbecvj3raFW6Qf9CHqyR93BGanamjhY_eVgU0BaUTZrz2xjwavvLPtqRO1420SOB89FJegDW7gUKUItsrug0Am2DIK7oF_6OiiE6YOg4&c=dWwbfh-MPf5BIR8eF_7bnn6Va0mkE74Q_SJbhSCrXGfNmWE5LUHl5Q==&ch=Kj_3VBwfDkMSPsA5YDrh9B0b-DzOzs5FfQuE6gdbNROs09cXkYslsg==) _**EVERY CONTRIBUTION PUTS US ONE STEP CLOSER TO VICTORY IN NOVEMBER**_
Young Kim is running to give conservative Californians a strong voice. In Congress she will fight for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. She will continue to be a leader in solving the issues of homelessness and affordability --_the issues we face every day._

[**Join our fight to restore common-sense leadership to Congress and put an end to the Left 's socialist agenda. If you're able, chip in $10 or whatever you can today.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AC41Mv3gJCDF6OZfEAINspFp4DXHrmhKI8d3T2p6oR8S9XLw4Fb6uRPxlAwEdtrzsscAMmx33XyOmzTsO7dFLF2PFWH43W83WkIVkqyzE_fUxcDiJknaCAC64_M_zh-R3DuHHTKJiDNSrvLXHnMRx2tYK0asix-mmnvJaDnZZduQVUTuM6UNlq3YpuFw763o-n1VDluDfXlEVaaYLV02z3D5mWmsY-6---0jS9SW68X0rNW0BbCoqzJNOhBjMLDlVoS73b0nsegHqx7Zw0FN70h1tbecvj3raFW6Qf9CHqyR93BGanamjhY_eVgU0BaUTZrz2xjwavvLPtqRO1420SOB89FJegDW7gUKUItsrug0Am2DIK7oF_6OiiE6YOg4&c=dWwbfh-MPf5BIR8eF_7bnn6Va0mkE74Q_SJbhSCrXGfNmWE5LUHl5Q==&ch=Kj_3VBwfDkMSPsA5YDrh9B0b-DzOzs5FfQuE6gdbNROs09cXkYslsg==)

Thank you,

Team Young

* * *
_
During this time of uncertainty, many American families are struggling to make ends meet. Please contribute only if you are able. If you are unable to donate at this time, we could still use your support --__[**endorse Young Kim here!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AC41Mv3gJCDF6OZfEAINspFp4DXHrmhKI8d3T2p6oR8S9XLw4Fb6uVSZ8y6MrX1BF1PHF6N598U_-erqBfawP9tSoOPhkWe-QT3PspqAl1naBWlxnEnyCLaCNNop620f0axdh7Md-LFOySI2Efn6HcFhwFBadG0b7nSFJ2erCFJecMFhjZ7lh7QJgmzgrzOMyvxUa8SVkRneKYB2JJ-2aedllRFAc2wRukJc0f_2NRNv9Gi20E9vwIeq_pJlnc1nwPNDbrQARp3znETNEWcn1Qt5KTRQ1QLcqwgPJxmu2ZXFb7X0vevtVi91GUp-BXN1N0cnKRsG1n27seCbHUadla3vdGx7n5Kw1U0WskmP2fY=&c=dWwbfh-MPf5BIR8eF_7bnn6Va0mkE74Q_SJbhSCrXGfNmWE5LUHl5Q==&ch=Kj_3VBwfDkMSPsA5YDrh9B0b-DzOzs5FfQuE6gdbNROs09cXkYslsg==)_

name: John Cornyn
subject: Send a note to Trump
body:
Friend, For weeks now, we have watched as our fearless leader and Commander in Chief Donald J. Trump has led our country through uncharted waters.
Our nation is going through something we've never experienced, and I am proud of the way President Trump and his administration has led our country.
I want President Trump to know that Texans support him. That's why I've opened up a page where you can send your well-wishes to the president. I think now more than ever, he could use a bit of encouragement.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: My Mother
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
I'm running for Congress for my mother and for the millions of women like her. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/66c0b8339236/my-mother?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
|
> | | | | _At a time when a lot of Americans are dealing with economic uncertainty, we completely understand if you cannot afford to donate right now. Stay safe. Let's get through this together_
> ---
| |
#
**This Mother's Day, I wanted to tell you about my mom**, and how she's inspired me to do many things, including running for Congress.

My mom is one of five kids. Her dad was an orphan, sometimes homeless, roaming the streets of Chicago in the ’30s and ’40s. Her mom was a Scottish immigrant who came — alone, a teenager — to the States via Canada. Together, they built the kind of life together that starts with next to nothing.

My mom was the middle child. She was smart and scrappy by nature, and, like her siblings, grew up fighting the trappings of the poverty she was born into. The flats of Oklahoma and the Kansas prairie offered no obvious solutions and my mom’s brothers and sister — my aunt and uncles — **struggled to even find the bootstraps by which they were supposed to pull themselves up.**

My mom struggled, too, but she got lucky — she went to a good school, and her family made her the center of their hopes that the next generation would have it better than the last. She worked hard to be the bearer of her family’s legacy, and though she dreamed of being a nurse, she met my dad when she was young, and together they made a life for themselves. Modest, to be sure, and sometimes very difficult, but they did just a little bit better than their parents before them. They did it with a lot of help (food stamps, the safety net of bankruptcy, a soldier’s salary) and they did it with my indomitable mom at the helm.

Imagine for a minute the kind of tenacity it takes to uproot three young children, again and again. Imagine the loneliness. Imagine what it’s like to send your spouse to war, to not know if he is coming back. Imagine the strength that takes. The dogged optimism. The quiet will.**That’s my mom. She is a force. I’m running for Congress for her. Because she raised me to be the kind of person who looks at a landscape riddled with challenges, to look at a battle that might seem all uphill, and to rush into it head-first, knowing that, with help and tenacity, we can have the kind of win here that will help people like my family, and like yours.**

Today, on Mother’s Day, [I ask you to consider making a gift to help send my mother's daughter (me) to Congress](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=91c8dcf107&e=140a9b81e7). With her help, and with yours, we are going to win this race.

name: Team LaHood
subject: They’ll always be there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress
body:
Even in our most uncertain times, our mothers are always there for us. Happy
Mother’s Day!

<>

Friend,

Happy Mother’s Day from my family to yours!
<>
Whether you celebrate with your loved ones in person or from a distance, we
hope that this day reminds us all that even in our most uncertain moments, our
moms are always there for us.

Mothers always wear many hats. They do everything they can to teach, guide,
and inspire those around them every single day.

Now with everything closed and the whole world adjusting, mothers have
certainly stepped up to care for and provide for their families and
neighborhoods –not because they have to, but because that’s what mothers do.

Mothers, thank you for all that you do for those around you. I hope that this
day is a special one.

-Darin LaHood

Paid for by LaHood for Congress

P.O. Box 10735 Peoria, IL 61612

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Happy Mother's Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

My family is dedicated to service. My father served 23 years in the Army. My brother, sister and I all attended West Point and then served in the military as well. But in a family with 4 veterans, my mother is the strongest of all of us.

It takes a mentally tough woman to allow her children to put themselves in harms way, even for a cause as valiant as defending our fellow Americans. It takes an even tougher mother to have all of her children deployed to combat zones at the same time. At one point in 2006, I was stationed in Iraq, flying missions over Baghdad, my brother Wrendon was stationed on a destroyer in the Persian Gulf and my sister D’Hania was serving as a military intelligence officer in the Green Zone.

But through this stressful situation, we never heard anything but loving and supportive words from her. While I’m sure it caused her severe anxiety and stress, my mother always understood that supporting those who are serving this country, whether it be in our military or in other service, is critical to preserving our Nation and our freedoms for future generations. She bore the burden of this anxiety on her own shoulders for the greater good, never letting us see the pain it caused.

It’s that selflessness that I hope to emulate every day in my private life. It’s that same attitude that I don’t see reflected in our politicians today and one of the reasons I’ve decided to run for Congress. I hope that I can bring the her spirit of selflessness and service to our government in Washington.

From my family to yours, I wish you a heartfelt happy Mother's Day and hope you’re celebrating with a mother as wonderful as mine.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e37f8324c8fb45c793985994bb0c5197&_e=lMZTZoqxEKs0SOCE629PHoIjc-7l9uObuSAApbC_qz6sCZVEkEjGY0TBMi61ttpc3yK_zx_KODzZIQQRjCxneEjc_utzVewRK4egVp4UnEIlYHabXTdQw-nFWxFfIZfXRWfnjG-SY3sbJjyxbwnOW7IMwCfk4PbSsPfWARdVQ0WMsxr94uIjmo7Oa6imgP3zH-9f6LTJznqm2nblH2GRSbcPOrfejHDl6k0Q3ypFIk6ebPxt8EhlTU-GXJQQeuQmVAc5ee5TLIHzza6PfP8PEW-JH01s6sQTvMxecA_lbQo%3D)****

It makes me so proud to be his mom, and it would make me even more proud if I could call him my son AND my Congressman.
**On this Mother 's Day, I want to give back to Francis for all he's done for me and our community. So please, add a donation so he can reach his $20,000 May fundraising goal and have the resources he needs to win this race!**
Thanks,

[**If we let Trump silence Dr. Fauci -- one of our most trusted sources during this crisis -- it will put the entire health of our country in jeopardy.**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b180/18e32a7f/4fc50267/7b21c716/49575828/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-health-survey?source=20200509_em_pet_b1_ftvbrl_ia")

Will you sign on before midnight to ensure Dr. Fauci can testify directly to Congress and the American people? >> **](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b180/18e32a7f/4fc50267/7b21c716/49575828/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-health-survey?source=20200509_em_pet_b1_ftvbrl_ia")_

Ben Ray

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b180/18e32a7f/4fc50267/7b21c70b/49575828/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

Dear Friend, Today is Mother's Day and I want to take a moment to celebrate Doyle, my amazing wife and partner in parenting. When it comes to mothering (just like in politics), she is focused, patient, strong, and connected. I know that she's the best Mom that our son and daughter could ever ask for. I am so grateful that Doyle is showing them that being their Mom means Taking a Stand for their future. Did you know that there are only 25 Moms with young kids in Congress (while there are over 100 Dads)? The systemic barriers trying to stop Doyle are very real, but our movement is strong, and growing every day. | [**_BREAKING NEWS from The New York Times:_
"Polls Had Trump Stewing, and Lashing Out at His Own Campaign"**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17444063/194578932/1012576086?refcode=VC_UD_20200510_EMPOLL_E1_Trump-Approval_T0-S0SL0C0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZWQ0MjNjLWZiOTItZWExMS04NmU5LTAwMTU1ZDAzYjVkZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zTpFTRrUbGyUxTB7wP4jrGMNeTeRLe_W7aUuXecNEnQ=&emci=05e86f0a-a291-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=70ed423c-fb92-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4584036) Peter -- Trump is in a full blown panic.

After you complete this poll, if you have a moment to spare, you should read a juicy excerpt from the NYTimes here: ↘↘
"Frustrated by a faltering economy that is out of his control, and facing blowback for his suggestion that disinfectants could potentially combat the coronavirus, **President Trump had sunk to one of his lowest points in recent months last week.** And he directed his anger toward the one area that is most important to him: his re-election prospects.

Mr. Trump, according to multiple people familiar with the exchange, **erupted during a phone call with his campaign manager, Brad Parscale,** two days after he was presented with polling data from his campaign and the Republican National Committee that showed him trailing Joseph R. Biden Jr., the presumptive Democratic nominee, in several crucial states.

**He lashed out at Mr. Parscale and said it was other people’s fault that there had been fluctuations in a race** they had all seen as his to lose just two months ago. At one point, Mr. Trump said he would not lose to Mr. Biden, **insisted the data was wrong and blamed the campaign manager for the fact that he is down in the polls,** according to one of the people familiar with the conversation. **Mr. Trump even made a threat to sue Mr. Parscale,** mentioning the money he has made while working for the president..."

name: The Hart Family
subject: Rita is more than a mother to us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/f1DujOkSJQo1FR5C2Ue5mp2peGTkCccqTFHM1SelJaw=/jAxm9_0aTWSTmkq3fijc7cy8CmuMETKc2Gn8e2G0Kl8=?refcode=200509-email) _We are grateful to have you on Team Hart! We know that right now many people are facing financial hardships, so if you cannot afford to give today -- that 's okay. We appreciate you opening and reading our campaign updates. If you would like to turn off these emails for a bit, then you can do so [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/f1DujOkSJQo1FR5C2Ue5mp2peGTkCccqTFHM1SelJaw=/LIbxG_wlBpwkJ4qNSPlDyCzAJZfProCrvPagmUe4s94=)._
* * *
Hi, this is Michaela, Marae, Karen, Tressa and Alec. We're Rita and Paul's five children. We hope everyone reading this is staying in good health during these unprecedented times and we also hope you have a beautiful Mother's Day. Like many other Iowans, we are feeling the sadness that we will not be able to celebrate together in person, but grateful for technology and looking forward to the day when we will safely be able to be together again. Speaking of Mother's Day, we want to talk about our mom. She has always been there for us. She has been a listening ear, a shoulder to cry on and never-ending support for all of us in different and special ways. She's also served as one of our greatest role models and has given us the tools to go out into the world and try our best to make it a better place. One of our mom's greatest skills is her ability to listen. With five children, that is not an easy feat, but she always managed to make each one of us feel heard and respected while we were growing up. To this day, she still has the capability to pinpoint when someone needs to be heard and gives them that opportunity. This spreads from our family and into her community when she advocates for so many who have maybe never been given this opportunity. As we all became older and have our own families/adult lives, we have come to see how wonderful our parents truly are and how privileged we are to have them as ours. Our mom's journey of going from a high school English teacher, to State Senator to now running for US Congress has truly inspired us as her children and as Iowans. This journey has shown to us our mom's fortitude as a leader and advocate. She's always reaching to make something better, be it for her children, her students, or her community. She doesn't just want to be a shoulder to lean on; she wants to address the core problems and WORK to make it better. She is an amazing mother and we love her so much-- she listens, she wants to understand, and she knows the importance of empathy, compassion and knowledge. That's why we are so glad she's taking her fight for others to Congress and we support her wholeheartedly. Happy Mother's Day, Mom! **[Will you support Rita's fight?](https://act.myngp.com/el/f1DujOkSJQo1FR5C2Ue5mp2peGTkCccqTFHM1SelJaw=/jAxm9_0aTWSTmkq3fijc7cy8CmuMETKc2Gn8e2G0Kl8=?refcode=200509-email)** | [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/f1DujOkSJQo1FR5C2Ue5mp2peGTkCccqTFHM1SelJaw=/jAxm9_0aTWSTmkq3fijc7cy8CmuMETKc2Gn8e2G0Kl8=?refcode=200509-email)
---

---

Wheatland IA 52777 United States

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: re: nursing homes in NY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
Upstate New Yorkers are being hurt by Cuomo’s actions and where is Anthony Brindisi? NOTHING but silence from our own congressman while his own consti [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=6f8a267892aa4dadbdd72a66f9ab3e6b&_e=FGmTvbyiBzcVVNnWMmQcnvWepa8fUt343wCCARlr-MqkNEeZznOGX9-S_rd0Al1cqalIrVDAqM49d7Rd6dOvIuWp3sJCJFI0TmCB_nfcTwQNP7qqz6ZPgv7OvU-5VJt9Z8rdAQsvlpccG1z5YjL66-B-SSijKR3hxK2mSooMeFezygWW1zzRxhgN3AA0APzNmkgmLdUB7fuTIpF2mI8QdTNQPivO7emwg8zIAwOnSa9_BSV2uG8Mb-PBmkQuyCCrlHc_Mmbp7mD483KhKkFCLAK_aSECKMqb1LOT191ltNALW96nhsIAYx08DpRCdeR7Hx6X-PAdA0OSt-J4XKUhzlXxoEotF43WmiMVr0NT3qEfs3vleUB_OZhnTqbFphIzFhTkGcqOY2ko2LsBEDhzF0AhPuoIPPy36G8jJGyEF6Z27N7190C21PhRIiSNkIVsP12esgLAEb77ISj9Vyz9WVo2xBqZYElSg38jERNpGrs%3D) Friend, Over 5,000 Coronavirus deaths in New York are attributed to those in nursing homes. And we have Andrew Cuomo to thank for that. **In March he issued an order demanding that nursing homes accept patients who tested positive for COVID-19 - DIRECTLY endangering our most vulnerable population.** It’s appalling and I am doing everything to hold him accountable for this tragic mistake. And it’s not just Governor Cuomo; it’s the deafening silence from our very own Anthony Brindisi, who hasn’t spoken out against Cuomo’s actions. Upstate New Yorkers are being hurt by Cuomo’s actions and where is Anthony Brindisi? NOTHING but silence from our own congressman while his own constituents die. Will you join me today by signing my petition? [ **HOLD CUOMO AND BRINDISI ACCOUNTABLE: SIGN NOW >>>** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=6f8a267892aa4dadbdd72a66f9ab3e6b&_e=FGmTvbyiBzcVVNnWMmQcnvWepa8fUt343wCCARlr-MqkNEeZznOGX9-S_rd0Al1cqalIrVDAqM49d7Rd6dOvIuWp3sJCJFI0TmCB_nfcTwQNP7qqz6ZPgv7OvU-5VJt9Z8rdAQsvlpccG1z5YjL66-B-SSijKR3hxK2mSooMeFezygWW1zzRxhgN3AA0APzNmkgmLdUB7fuTIpF2mI8QdTNQPivO7emwg8zIAwOnSa9_BSV2uG8Mb-PBmkQuyCCrlHc_Mmbp7mD483KhKkFCLKM5jZT65tdazCsh-0hAb61wxNDFyLG2rweDf-ov-GerwZrfRaU4G65pBacwOvaTFgUGncfodh1XLJeA1QvD7lZoWNjhyUpnUnFxDD0h7NKppGJQUkjCCrLLWkdSAISzAgIkcNuZAYeSIhCC3J6fRW5xEGUqIi1cYIH41FUN3ye5D3au1IIdTVEQWo6p3On8FowJer8zwnuKSUxwHYuCX8E%3D) While Governor Cuomo has become quite the media darling throughout this crisis, very few are covering the consequences of his actions. His total mismanagement of nursing homes in New York is nothing short of a tragedy. And the truth is: _it was all about money_. He wanted these seniors released from hospitals and shuffled into nursing homes to decrease the Medicaid reimbursement requirements! **[SIGN NOW TO HOLD CUOMO AND BRINDISI ACCOUNTABLE>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=6f8a267892aa4dadbdd72a66f9ab3e6b&_e=FGmTvbyiBzcVVNnWMmQcnvWepa8fUt343wCCARlr-MqkNEeZznOGX9-S_rd0Al1cqalIrVDAqM49d7Rd6dOvIuWp3sJCJFI0TmCB_nfcTwQNP7qqz6ZPgv7OvU-5VJt9Z8rdAQsvlpccG1z5YjL66-B-SSijKR3hxK2mSooMeFezygWW1zzRxhgN3AA0APzNmkgmLdUB7fuTIpF2mI8QdTNQPivO7emwg8zIAwOnSa9_BSV2uG8Mb-PBmkQuyCCrlHc_Mmbp7mD483KhKkFCLAi0fA4xh7XOSq9R_g-r_R1pPUm2RRKvF18pcXE2wCPbDZ8pWsrvj_m7oA8FrUsVskR6ADW_meglVA1BpeGtVpJaQLFwcnK2XuafgabW9XYf8pD8SkA8y45Fulg8ta84rdEjsqsTc5MCNgBAeMJc1XlYG6QrsNLKUeCmmAajQDG4SRWQBzvAP2ZNAl4Y3TvZhHHaxlno9Bsgt6XzT0e2h74%3D)** These vulnerable seniors should have stayed in hospitals where they were better equipped to handle these patients. Upstate New York had plenty of beds to take care of them after canceling elective procedures! **His irresponsible orders have been lethal to vulnerable seniors and the silence from the left is deafening.**
* The media won’t hold him accountable.
* **Anthony Brindisi** won’t hold him accountable.
* The Democrats are completely silent.

It is up to us to hold the Governor and Brindisi accountable. **I hope you’ll join me by signing my petition today:[https://secure.winred.com/tenney-for-congress/Accountable](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=6f8a267892aa4dadbdd72a66f9ab3e6b&_e=FGmTvbyiBzcVVNnWMmQcnvWepa8fUt343wCCARlr-MqkNEeZznOGX9-S_rd0Al1cqalIrVDAqM49d7Rd6dOvIuWp3sJCJFI0TmCB_nfcTwQNP7qqz6ZPgv7OvU-5VJt9Z8rdAQsvlpccG1z5YjL66-B-SSijKR3hxK2mSooMeFezygWW1zzRxhgN3AA0APzNmkgmLdUB7fuTIpF2mI8QdTNQPivO7emwg8zIAwOnSa9_BSV2uG8Mb-PBmkQuyCCrlHc_Mmbp7mD483KhKkFCLHlhyWv2VfZtwAYiw0bjxVWRZAbFeM5Bt59yITdkKp0QbvQTXpRCcRA3w90pIQKxoi73SVRxOHuDPqjfldMm4Q0KeE-Oc7RsVmPTqIpvX0nJu2gd6UpTE_VC7536eah5-PjVrOkIVkQtFGVKHt7s1tHVcTTlbg3fkaLiJvARur1LWYJMIdkgSi34x14B5X-2MDcWDC6sRz4UZVsWRjZudfg%3D)** New York’s seniors deserve so much better. -Claudia Tenney |

name: Cory Booker
subject: My mom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Friends, If you know me, you know how special my mother is and how deeply she has impacted my journey as a public servant. Her lessons of empathy, leadership, and grace are ones I carry in my head and my heart every day I serve the people of New Jersey in the Senate. Today I'm thinking about my mother, Carolyn, as well as all the mothers who balance taking care of their families while working, volunteering, marching, voting, and everything in between. This day is devoted to all of the women out there who are mothers -- in biology and spirit -- taking care of our kids, our communities, and our country. It's about the love, strength, and sacrifice that women commit their lives to build up others, to being there for scraped knees, broken hearts, professional and personal advice, or just a shoulder to cry on when we need it most. I know Mother's Day is especially difficult this year -- as many of us can't spend today with our moms in person. But if you have a special woman in your life that you're celebrating today, I'd love to hear about her. Just reply to this email with stories about the mothers in your life -- I look forward to reading them. Happy Mother's Day, friend -- and to those whose mothers are no longer around, may the day land gently. Cory

---
PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
---
[unsubscribe](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e04/5fca0d19/7dd77e57/291d607d/876625458/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe")

name: Jessica Morse
subject: Continuing my Mother’s Legacy During COVID-19: Building the Fresno Farm Bridge
body:
Hello and Happy Mother’s Day,
Selfless service was my mother’s legacy. She approached the world with deep love and a warm smile. Our campaign was built on her legacy of service to community and country. And while it didn’t yield a Congressional seat, our campaign built a community for good. From supporting the Paradise Camp Fire recovery, to inspiring women to run, to wellness calls during COVID-19, I’m inspired by the impact that continues to ripple out of this movement.
Today, we are called again to support those left behind in the COVID crisis. More than one in five American households are facing hunger while crops are rotting in fields because of disrupted supply chains. To address this, I've started the [Fresno Farm Bridge](https://4rd0l.r.ah.d.sendibm4.com/mk/cl/f/mBFBBv7l0JIbuPkA1jV3GzTmFmTzf8XBxh2K3D-cYrvWgPctPED4U_8T4DyaggkAuIsz45zhBCzemhStMII3UwchNqeh3xbBMVWLFczCJQhNO5ZTxBd_EXgANBoRrc5TJFgN_k8ItytIGqE9SG6j4EbuqUWZxu8hhzj_mlo77JV6429KEVGujH4), a collaboration among four California-based NGOs, to purchase crops from Southeast Asian and other minority farmers in the Central Valley who lost their supply chain, donate this produce to food banks for families in need, and help connect these farmers to new urban markets.

[Can you help today?](https://4rd0l.r.ah.d.sendibm4.com/mk/cl/f/jRYu-TdYXoUw51RdTUVXu6eS2ghmdAISNOVW2gjSiF0t5aaxn2CQV-fZgTQjRKVdSevbbbwVJHZ0Uuax5M-Xm6eRoHafKbyL3g8NuEFtnan6yUE0dqtrba7vurkTNAf6_FO4wpzlUnldNDBc9W1vUIaWSveKEZc5pDqy7F06oHIdGlauQKUSD-Y)

Thousands of Hmong refugees farmers in California’s Central Valley who typically sell produce at farmers markets, restaurants, and along the roadside fruit stands you visit on your way to Yosemite, are losing their crops and their livelihood. They are[ falling through the cracks](https://4rd0l.r.ah.d.sendibm4.com/mk/cl/f/KsE3vmU0H5g7keDWIQlIugFEPsgvgc1Dcn8immRzsmvIaNgLvzmmcSJVJTFb4-bplWfI4O6ue8yc-ajIfUPNy_ytBWmrXxm5eFpkba0lkOQompCM5Xli_tpQkuk3HpjWmpUA-aAX8jAjQjn0SZyAJYPmsLDnaE8Pg5PBw0_EcAcSesIjPwQEmgSsP2Czt-9wfv3qAYMUrM9E5JUVrjp1qOeTsA) due to political and structural barriers:
* Their crop yields are too small for the federal and state programs designed around industrial agriculture;
* They lack education, language, and tools to re-connect to markets; and,
* Recent actions by the Trump administration[ targeting Hmong and Laotian refugees ](https://4rd0l.r.ah.d.sendibm4.com/mk/cl/f/ORVyKe794D1UryVU-zn3Nqcw6ljmdnZeE2Yo0IxfdaJW068Jr-0wt-SJc3Do1gPmUwFwp8-EaMC1nsGUMwC9bbzQK1o0t16JQIBH-Dh0vfBAOIy26EIhd7erLvCZfK9Q_mw4fso1jlcFF6_tEyZcWQmHijkMNkgpKh7N1WeMEwy7eyE0QDpjlwgDJjVSXRszq5qTOSS04Nu6EqcQJoLqRd2OMvQh30RTAJdknxtf9CBQEGwOQw_03HgjGZX1UX_mMv0)has driven these communities further underground.

Your generous contribution yields a three-fold investment: farmers get reimbursed for crops that would have rotted; families in need get access to fresh produce; and, vulnerable farmers are connected to critical support to access new markets.
To launch the initiative, I’m investing $25,000 from my remaining campaign funds. I need your help to make this program whole and keep these farmers afloat. [Every day we wait, crops are failing while families desperately in need of this fresh produce, face hunger.](https://4rd0l.r.ah.d.sendibm4.com/mk/cl/f/yVsxC7zS9r8Yzf5t8OIydHwjnElhZt6TWaLI6J1w-03-wfM_EaqCdHRNoMpLib4pi5L-r1uhrrvnLHHx__ko0L7ZLEyBnIMAfANhNnwdJV3ok2xUCKGUFiUIGeAyASxkWNp4OSe3Wq-Pm5lMqdTqA0pB0Dx7YCsx1Gco7M9TnUrjHD7IeM5wLF0)
[Can you support a farmer today?](https://4rd0l.r.ah.d.sendibm4.com/mk/cl/f/n6ofRwzoxcwZDvqSpRhqusUdkB5TxXSUV4ra8E0pIpPrvExev6-g1VT-MTIjDmlFX-NyfrZl0sduUThneMBJfrm_r598VwAzoDfgcFX5JDDQVRmKic3gLo8HD2_NpSom9fLYjY-Hcxc-uQjiOa2tdofgQrQWNAWasmCyAsCxtk7D7G9MbaE0zjM)
A $5,000 contribution will bridge a single farmer for the next two months, provide fresh vegetables for 500 families, and buy time and expert support for the farmer to reconnect to new markets.
A $500 donation will buy 20 boxes of produce from a farmer and provide fresh fruits and vegetables for 20 families.
[Help rescue a farm and feed families in need. Every dollar counts!](https://4rd0l.r.ah.d.sendibm4.com/mk/cl/f/e2w7M4A-4VjRpLHWIUmgp4Rzf32TDj6d64rYI0CybiI4ddy_oFRezf3JCDM3zEMFojkBVWcNb7bGLs11SOuwjATLw5qe7HMqO5dE-ecvApXICnc5Pf8hUUZ-52WSIV0BBeG7jsYxTuVqNoCrNvThzefcH-bqqChUUMqBWbeCgok9wveYlGVwGH4)

While there are many critical causes right now, I decided to support the Hmong farmers, not only because the need is urgent and formal programs are not reaching them, but to honor my mother's legacy.
Growing up, every morning on our way to school, we drove past community gardens. Hmong refugees lived in the neighborhood and they had transformed abandoned lots from dumping grounds for old couches into lush vegetable farms. My mom, an aficionado of both botany and Alice Waters’ farm to table movement from her days in Berkeley, would eagerly point out the daily progress of the crops. She giggled in glee when she spotted unique plants like bitter melon or sugar cane, unusual for 1980’s California. As a kid, I saw the respect and admiration my Mom had for these gardners. Their devotion to farmcraft was evident in the quality of plants, and their hard work transformed abandoned urban lots into something practical and beautiful. Her respect for this community fundamentally shaped my perspective on refugees and immigrants. I never saw them as outsiders, but as resilient, hardworking and self-sufficient members of our community.
One day, we went to a Hmong community craft fair. My mom purchased a quilted book bag from a woman in traditional garb. Mom attempted to strike up a conversation about the community gardens we loved. Although the woman spoke limited english, vegetables she knew. They laughed and smiled together through broken words and gestures. Suddenly the woman thrust a little cloth necklace into the palm of my mom’s hand -- two miniature dolls on a red yarn string. I watched her close my mother’s hand around the gift and smile. My mom placed her hand on top of the woman’s and smiled back. I watched this momentary bond, a bond over a shared love of our community and a deep respect for the other’s contribution to it. My mom wore that necklace for years, not because of its fashion appeal, but because it represented love.
When I heard the Hmong farmers were in trouble, I knew this is where I needed to help. While my mom may be gone from the world, her love remains. The Fresno Farm Bridge is my best effort to deliver my Mom’s love back to a community that she admired and respected.
[Join me this Mother’s Day in empowering a community, feeding families, and honoring my own Mother’s legacy of love and service.](https://4rd0l.r.ah.d.sendibm4.com/mk/cl/f/o581wwcPbxzXslPddIOsLpJ6GcraqH3xLBKwcrFPga1q1jgbPl4cnLXPrejerhxS26u7tQqCiOSw1_REE6APiLPHihDDTBxMio3NN-Hu7SO_Rr7IhaoOjKdhJmstbGjr5IbEU0RxgzxQLcIy29DPrhmAvywveoltRCaAMuTOAVrhZBKS5FZjIyE)
Happy Mother’s Day, Mom. I miss you every day. And I’m doing my best to keep your love rippling through the world.
Jessica

If you wish to unsubscribe from our newsletter, click [here](https://4rd0l.r.ah.d.sendibm4.com/mk/un/sSP_LPXGQ3D0mOOzSXaACes9WmqXzru95j4rX7k4O_eWEq7mPqIsWOiBCEZN-oZkD2yFqcl-BUrTeMrpy37uLCW7M65bZTpRYPSolNaCGrpvfNLVrbpE_WHHvWsBtXNN-MifwNhEtiyOxaQ)
clean_body: Hello and Happy Mother’s Day, Selfless service was my mother’s legacy. She approached the world with deep love and a warm smile. Our campaign was built on her legacy of service to community and country. And while it didn’t yield a Congressional seat, our campaign built a community for good. name: Team Christy
subject: We're behind >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

There are no two ways to slice it. We are down right now.

Republicans are turning in their ballots faster than Democrats. We might just lose this toss-up election.

In the last few days, as we've ramped up our ads and volunteer calls, things have been improving. But we're running out of time and we're running out of money.

**[Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to power us across the finish line. We can't lose this race. And with your help, we won't.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbdb/29776869/a639938/569f1d4c/3783262696/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTBfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEzX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200510_onemillion13_non")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbdb/29776869/a639938/569f1d4d/3783262696/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTBfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEzX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200510_onemillion13_non&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbdb/29776869/a639938/569f1d4e/3783262696/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTBfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEzX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200510_onemillion13_non&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbdb/29776869/a639938/569f1d49/3783262696/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTBfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEzX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200510_onemillion13_non&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbdb/29776869/a639938/569f1d4c/3783262696/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTBfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEzX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200510_onemillion13_non")

That's why we're asking for your support with just a few days left. Every dollar makes a difference, and every vote makes a difference.

name: Brandon Hegar
subject: Who MJ is to us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
It's Mother's Day, and I wanted to reflect a bit on what MJ means to my family and Texas.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489008c/7f51f7bc/4fabf123/4ef15caf/3412861681/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | _We know this can be a difficult holiday for some. If you 'd prefer not to receive emails about Mother's Day, [click here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489008c/7f51f7bc/4fabf123/4ef15cae/3412861681/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-mothersdayoptout") and we won't send you any more._ Peter,

**If I know _anything_ about MJ, I know that she is:**
* A kick-ass mom, out there fighting for a future for all our kids, and we're so lucky to get to celebrate her today.
* A hard worker -- she doesn't give up (whether she's taking on the Taliban, the Pentagon, or kids trying to stay up past their bedtime) and she keeps going till she wins.
* Going to be an amazing senator for Texas.

| [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489008c/7f51f7bc/4fabf123/4ef15cad/3412861681/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-motherdaycard2")
---
